code: import{useEffect,useState}from"react";import api from"../api/client";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const DashboardPage=()=>{const[summary,setSummary]=useState(null);useEffect(()=>{api.get("/dashboard").then(res=>setSummary(res.data));},[]);if(!summary)return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"loading-text",children:"Loading dashboard..."});const stats=[{label:"Total",value:summary.total},{label:"Todo",value:summary.todo},{label:"In Progress",value:summary.inProgress},{label:"Done",value:summary.done},{label:"Overdue",value:summary.overdue}];return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"card",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{children:"Dashboard"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"grid grid-4",children:stats.map(item=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"card stat-card",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{children:item.label}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"stat-value",children:item.value})]},item.label))})]});};export default DashboardPage;
